payload.rationale: Leader checks if logs are committed to its term
Leader only accepts MsgReadIndex after committing at least one log entry in its current term
Leader's commit status in current term

payload.label: leader_read_index_ready
payload.rationale: Leader is ready to accept read index
Test leader dropping read only request before committing in its term
Test leader dropping read only request without committing in its term

payload.query: raft rs read index current term invariant hidden state quorum leader

selection.rationale: Prefer the strictest reviewer that preserves false-accept control, recall, and runtime. Abstentions are tolerated when they do not reduce useful outcomes.
